caseStudies.label: Problem
caseStudies.text: Weak digital presence — no premium website to attract clients.

caseStudies.label: Solution
caseStudies.text: Premium bilingual booking website with WhatsApp & Google Maps sync.

caseStudies.label: Outcome
caseStudies.text: Stronger online trust and easier client conversion.

caseStudies.label: Problem
caseStudies.text: Slow manual operations hurting efficiency and customer satisfaction.

caseStudies.label: Solution
caseStudies.text: Integrated management dashboard with inventory tracking and analytics.

caseStudies.label: Outcome
caseStudies.text: Improved workflow efficiency and reduced operational errors.
